# OnChainDeploy

> OnChainDeploy is a no-code smart contract deployment platform on Base Mainnet. It lets anyone deploy and verify smart contracts with one click — no Solidity, no Remix, no coding required.

## What it does

OnChainDeploy allows non-technical users to deploy pre-tested smart contract templates to Base Mainnet (Ethereum Layer 2, chain ID 8453) directly from their browser using a Web3 wallet such as MetaMask or Rabby.

## Key facts

- Deployment is free — users only pay Base network gas fees (typically a fraction of a cent)
- Optional contract verification on BaseScan costs a flat $0.09 paid in ETH
- Fully non-custodial — the platform never holds user funds, private keys, or controls contracts
- Supported wallets: MetaMask, Rabby
- Network: Base Mainnet (chain ID 8453)
- All deployments are permanent and recorded on-chain

## Available contract templates

- GM Beacon — say GM on-chain with a global and personal counter
- Simple Storage — store and retrieve a single value on-chain
- Hello Base — a greeter contract that stores and emits messages
- Counter — track increments permanently on-chain
- Voting — run tamper-proof one-wallet-one-vote polls
- Mood Tracker — record a mood with a timestamp
- Visitor Tracker — count visits and track the last visitor
- Chain Notes — leave a permanent note with wallet and timestamp
- Lucky Block — every wallet stores its own lucky number

Coming soon: ERC-20 tokens, NFT drops, multi-sig wallets, airdrop tools.

## How it works

1. Connect a Web3 wallet (MetaMask or Rabby)
2. Choose a contract template
3. Click Deploy — confirm the transaction in your wallet
4. The contract is live on Base Mainnet instantly
5. Optionally verify the source code on BaseScan for $0.09

## Why use OnChainDeploy instead of Remix

Remix requires writing or pasting Solidity code, manual compilation, and understanding deployment parameters. OnChainDeploy requires none of this — it is designed for people who want a deployed, verified contract without any technical complexity.

## Links

- Website: https://on-chain-deploy.vercel.app
- Built on: Base (https://base.org)
- Explorer: BaseScan (https://basescan.org)
